waves.note: Scope Expansion 2 (user-directed after epic-gate review): findings + format-agnostic + BC hard removal + gf2 migration. Plan: dev/active/f6a704d0-expansion2-plan.md (v2). Sequencing: A,B parallel -> C (gf2 migrate, last use of migration code) -> D (hard removal).

issues.title: Fix epic-review correctness findings (schema collision, checker-command enforce, gate PID)
Format-agnostic validation: per-issue content_format + repo default + parser dispatch

escalations.topic: feature-gated html/xml parity test not exercised by default-only cargo-ci gate
escalations.decision: Add a separate features gate (user choice)
escalations.resolution: Defined gate cargo-ci-features (cargo clippy+test -p jit --features html,xml); added as required gate on 00525fe0

escalations.topic: validator-cache keying: contradictory review rounds (no-alias vs literal 'once per rule'); exceeded rework attempts
escalations.decision: Keep schema-identity keying; amend decision record AND issue success criterion (user approved both)
escalations.resolution: DR 5.2 + plan + issue 7df61f62 criterion revised from 'once per rule' to 'once per distinct schema (schema identity)'; code unchanged

escalations.topic: 6 review rounds; adversarial review used; pre-existing httpbin.org network test blocked gates
escalations.decision: User: continue+be careful+adversarial reviewer; then point flaky test at local mock
escalations.resolution: All findings fixed; check_links external-URL test now uses an in-process loopback mock; 25ad2a02 done

escalations.topic: custom label_regex parity: engine has no write-only local rule, so the migrated custom-regex rule (severity=error) also fails jit validate, which legacy validate_labels did not. a0f0f342 at MAX rework (2).
escalations.decision: User chose: amend the criterion (document the deviation) rather than add a write-only Rule-model concept
escalations.resolution: DR 8.3a + a0f0f342 criterion 2 + ## Approved Deviations record the deviation; parity_custom_label_regex_also_applies_to_validate pins intended behavior; defaults.rs comments corrected; gates green; a0f0f342 done

escalations.topic: planning failure: first impl shipped a PARTIAL migration (kept 6 of 8 [validation] keys live, hard-coded rules remain) because orphan/strategic graph warnings (Assertion::TypeHierarchy) have NO rules.toml surface, so DR 8.2/8.3 'single source of truth / no hard-coded rules' was not achievable as scoped. Adversarial review FAILed it on DR conformance.
escalations.decision: User: planning failure; EXPAND scope to do it properly (add the missing TOML surface + full migration), plan it, dispatch a plan reviewer, drive to completion when green
escalations.resolution: DONE. Plan v2 implemented (worktree-agent-0abaddc0-full); 2 rework rounds (D6 template+idempotency; then materialize-existing + schema no-clobber). Dogfooded this repo. gates green at merge 5c91268. NOTE: user flagged backward-compat work as largely wasted (one real consumer ../gf2) - memory feedback-jit-single-user-no-backward-compat.

escalations.topic: epic-level code-review found 4 findings (schema collision, checker-command enforce ignored, pre-existing gate PID bug, production hardcodes Markdown defeating format-agnostic design)
escalations.decision: User EXPANDED SCOPE: fix findings; per-issue content_format + repo default + production parser dispatch; HARD-REMOVE migration/backward-compat (only jit+gf2 pre-1.0, both migrated); migrate jit+gf2 as deliverables. Plan-reviewed v2.
escalations.resolution: IN PROGRESS — 4 tasks created+wired (A 5e79ba48, B e93af54b, C 2fb9f910, D d4188154). See f6a704d0-handoff-2.md + expansion2-plan.md. One flagged deviation: auto-scaffold-on-read changed to in-memory-default-on-read (plan MF4).
